name: stockyard-batchqueue
description: Async job queue for LLM requests with priority levels, concurrency control, and retry. Queue thousands of requests and process them reliably.

tools.name: batchqueue_submit
tools.description: Submit a new LLM request to the queue. Returns a job ID.

tools.name: batchqueue_status
tools.description: Get status of a queued job by ID.

tools.name: batchqueue_result
tools.description: Get the result of a completed job.

tools.name: batchqueue_queue_stats
tools.description: Get queue statistics: pending, processing, completed, failed.

tools.name: batchqueue_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a pending or processing job.

tools.name: batchqueue_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the BatchQueue proxy is running and healthy.
